title: Blocks Of Ruins
description: This mod adds some archeology elements to find new and fun decoration blocks to use in your builds
body:
Adds a list of "ruins" blocks to spice up building in your world!

First have to find these ruins sites that includes the blocks and suspious gravel that will only drop items related to the mod

Most blocks can be made with ruin stone but some require more, thankfully if you do not wanna keep collecting from these mildly uncommon ruins you can use either a gold ingot or copper ingot to make the bags of collection for copper and transformation for gold

Most of the items is shown in the video and the images in the gallery, it's not a large mod only really focusing on this small subset of blocks
